name_cn:
[Full original packaging] Quality
Medium size in stock!!️
Toujours Series, latest blue for autumn/winter, simply too beautiful, high-appeal large bag, very fresh color, eye-catching, effortlessly exudes a premium feel, oversized checkered design, paired with classic letter accessories, very modern and stylish, bag structure is soft, calf leather material feels premium, unique buckle that folds the side when fastened, capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items
size:28.5*19*21cm
